project_type: AWS CDK Java application - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
language: Java 17 (compiles with Java 25 in sandbox, targets 17 via maven-compiler-plugin)
build_system: Maven 3.9.10 with exec-maven-plugin for CDK app execution. Proxy configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml. Surefire sets NODE_OPTIONS to empty for Jsii compatibility.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack(), Match.*). Tests parse state machine DefinitionString JSON using Jackson ObjectMapper to verify state transitions.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' and confirm all tests pass. 2. Run 'mvn -e -q compile exec:java' to verify CDK synth succeeds.
setup_instructions: Maven proxy already configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml. All CDK dependencies cached in local repository. Run 'mvn compile' to verify build.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - Maven Central accessible via proxy. Java 25 runtime with Java 17 target. CDK CLI available via npx. Maven settings.xml with proxy must be present at ~/.m2/settings.xml.
contribution_requirements: TDD workflow (test first, implement to pass). Conventional commits. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with implementation (Mermaid diagram + text). Least-privilege IAM. Every CDK construct must have a corresponding assertion test.
key_patterns: Each test file focuses on one concern (DynamoDB, SNS, Lambda, StepFunctions, InputValidation, PipelineWiring). Tests use Template.fromStack() with Match.* for resource properties. Complex state machine verification uses Jackson to parse DefinitionString from Fn::Join intrinsics. CdkBaseStack is a monolithic stack. CdkBaseApp creates a single stack with no environment parameterization.
directory_structure: Standard Maven layout: src/main/java/com/myorg/ (CdkBaseApp, CdkBaseStack), src/test/java/com/myorg/ (7 test files, 53 total tests), src/main/resources/lambda/audio-processor/ (Python Lambda code). Root has pom.xml, cdk.json, ARCHITECTURE.md.
